How it works

A meaningful move
done the right way

Finding the place that truly fits your lifestyle and rhythm is not always straightforward. Before anything else, we take the time to understand how you want to live, and then we bring that place to life, the streets, the community, the cafés, the pace of a Monday morning. The right home follows naturally from there.

01
Remote exploration

A deep conversation about your lifestyle, values and what the word "home" truly means to you. A personalised area profile is built before you ever board a flight.

02
Discovery trip

Two to four days on the ground together, beaches, restaurants, markets, local schools, and the kinds of neighbours who become friends. You fall in love with the place first.

03
Property & paperwork

Homes are visited together, documentation is verified in full, legal and financial partners are coordinated, and we stand with you at the notary on signing day.

04
Integration

Neighbours, doctors, schools, and the local fishmonger who saves you the finest catch of the day. We stay close until Portugal feels like it was always home.

Who we are

We bring together every licensed and credentialed professional you need for your transition to Portugal. Our team of consultants, lawyers, and accountants will guide you through every step of making this country your home.

Why we started this

We know this process from the inside, which means we have the right tools to make it go well.

I'm Kate. I was born in Portugal, and I'll walk alongside you throughout your relocation so that your transition is safe, complete, and nothing falls through the cracks. Together with my team, we help you find the right place to live for the lifestyle you're looking for, and handle all the bureaucratic steps that come with it.

Atlantic coast · 30 min from Lisbon Cascais

Cosmopolitan yet quietly Portuguese. International schools, a thriving expat community, world-class cycling and golf, and a historic centre that still belongs entirely to the locals.

Discover Cascais →
Arrábida Natural Park · Authentic village Sesimbra

A genuine fishing village cradled inside a natural park. Water so clear it startles you. Fresh seafood pulled from the sea that morning. A community that takes time to welcome you, and then never forgets you.

Discover Sesimbra →
Packages

Choose your
level of support

Every package is fixed-fee, you always know exactly what you're paying. Commissions on property sales are never charged, which means the guidance given is entirely yours. Payment is 50% on start, 50% on completion.

Entry · For explorers
Discovery
€990 fixed fee
  • 60-min onboarding call to map your vision
  • 1 full day on location together
  • Local life immersion, schools, markets, community
  • Personalised area report to take home
  • 30 days of WhatsApp support
Get started →
Most chosen
Full service · For movers
Settle
€2.900 fixed fee
  • Everything in Discovery
  • Property viewings across multiple agencies, with full access to legal documentation
  • Full document due diligence
  • Legal partner coordination
  • Notary accompaniment on signing day
  • 3 months post-purchase support
Get started →
Premium · For families
Roots
€5.500 fixed fee
  • Everything in Settle
  • NIF, bank account, NHR / NHR 2.0
  • School enrolment support
  • Health insurance & GP registration
  • 6 months of community integration
  • Personal local network introductions
Get started →
Client stories

People who found
their place

"I had spent nine months looking for a new home. As soon as I saw Sesimbra, the beach, the shops, the restaurants, I knew this was where I wanted to be. You offered me patience, showing me countless places, encouraging me, guiding me. Helping with the paperwork was wonderful, but it is your kind spirit that I most appreciate. I know that you are a true friend."

Scott Lacy California → Sesimbra

"The whole experience was brilliant. Kate was a wonderful host she made us feel welcome and spent time with us individually to get to know us and ensure we had the best experience while exploring Sesimbra and Azeitão. By the second morning we knew Sesimbra was home, before we'd looked at a single property."

Ruby A. & Thomas M. Sweden → Sesimbra

"The due diligence alone was worth every cent. Issues in the property paperwork were caught that our own lawyer had missed entirely."

Henrik & Maja L. Stockholm → Cascais · 2024
